_comment: Hot-path performance budgets enforced by check-bench-budgets.mjs (punchlist #5). budgetNs is a CI-load-tolerant ceiling on the criterion MEAN — generous enough to absorb runner jitter, tight enough to catch a real (~10x) regression. `target` records the documented hot-path goal the bench defends. `path` is relative to target/criterion.

benches.target: ADR-020 QuotaTracker hot path <500ns p99 (single atomic load + compare)
Gateway per-request admission overhead (feeds the <25ms-p99 budget)
ADR-036 circuit-breaker allow-path check on the hot path
ADR-029 pre-decode reject of a 10 MiB payload <1µs p50
ADR-029 pre-decode accept of a normal payload
ADR-029 post-decode size/cardinality pass on a small span
ADR-030 HLL++ observe on the common repeated-key path
